steps.title: Apply the probability formula
steps.content:
The probability that a randomly selected subscriber is a Safaricom subscriber equals the ratio of Safaricom subscribers to total subscribers.

We're told this probability is 0.38, there are $p$ million Safaricom subscribers, and 104 million total subscribers on October 31, 2016.
Setting up the equation:
$$\frac{p}{104} = 0.38$$

steps.title: Solve for p and round
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by 104:
$$p = 0.38 \times 104$$
Calculating: $p = 39.52$
Rounding to the nearest integer, $p = 40$ million.
